topic: The tools on my garage workbench rearrange themselves into letters every Wednesday night
title: The Tools on My Garage Workbench Rearrange into Letters Every Wednesday | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The tools on my garage workbench rearrange themselves into letters every Wednesday night.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a detached garage at night with a wooden pegboard wall and tools laid out on a workbench in shapes that loosely resemble letters, dim single bulb light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Detached garage. Pegboard wall. Organized by category for fifteen years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a tidy garage workbench with a pegboard above it covered in hand tools hanging in neat rows, dim ambient light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Weekend projects in summer. Garage stays closed all winter.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior of a closed white detached garage door at dusk in a residential backyard, dim porch light, no people, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Came in Thursday last March. Tools were on the bench.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden workbench with several wrenches and screwdrivers scattered across its surface in a rough pattern, dim morning light through a window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Garage door locked. No footprints in the dust.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a concrete garage floor showing a thin even layer of dust with no footprints across it, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Started photographing the pegboard every Wednesday before locking up.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone held up to photograph a pegboard of tools, only the hand and phone visible, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photos show the same tools rearranged each week into shapes.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of two smartphone photos side by side on a kitchen counter showing tools arranged in different patterns on the same workbench, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Laid them flat on a sheet of plywood. Photographed from above.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a sheet of plywood on a garage floor with hand tools arranged across its surface in an organized pattern, dim overhead light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Letters. Each week a few more. Sentence forming over six weeks.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a smartphone screen displaying a grid of six tool photographs each forming a different letter visible from above, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The sentence read MY KEYS ARE STILL IN HERE.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a plywood sheet with hand tools arranged to spell out a complete sentence visible from above, dim garage light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Searched the rafters. Found a ring of keys on a hook I did not install.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a brass ring of old keys hanging from a small hook attached to a wooden garage rafter, dim flashlight beam visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The keys are old. None fit anything on my property. Each fits something somewhere.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of an old brass ring with eight different aged keys laid out on a wooden workbench, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
